jobs.title: Senior Member Technical Staff
jobs.summary: Full-stack delivery across Salesforce core setup, services, admin UIs, APIs, and AI-backed experiences for marketers. Scrum lead for fast, iterative shipping in CDP, activation, Einstein, and Data Cloud—including custom MCP-style architecture, LLM-driven features, retrieval (RAG), prompt orchestration, broad skill generation, and guardrails so marketing systems stay trustworthy. Notable ship: the Personalization decisioning pipeline and majority of the Salesforce Core–side setup with my immediate team; the line became profitable within its first year.

jobs.title: Member Technical Staff
jobs.summary: Software engineering on Salesforce’s marketing and data-related products; foundation for later AI and Data Cloud work after Buddy Media’s acquisition.

jobs.title: Developer
jobs.summary: Built and maintained web and platform features for social marketing products—experience that carried into Salesforce after the acquisition.
